## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Install `@agentojs/...` version X.Y.Z
2. Configure provider with ...
3. Call method ...
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or stack traces if available.

## Environment

- **Node.js version:** (e.g., 20.11.0)
- **OS:** (e.g., macOS 14.3, Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11)
- **Package versions:**
  - `@agentojs/core`:
  - `@agentojs/medusa` (or other provider):
  - `@agentojs/express`:

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem (screenshots, logs, related issues).
